div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Starts Codex and Claude
helper commands when required

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Runs ai-usage from a shell to
inspect provider balances,
spend, subscription quotas,
token usage, and local
history.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Argparse-driven command
process exposed as
ai_usage.cli:main and the
ai-usage console script.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Stores normalized provider
snapshots for --history
queries; raw provider
payloads are not stored.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Credential and OAuth state
outside the repo:
~/.hermes/.env,
~/.config/vastai/vast_api_key,
~/.hermes/auth.json,
~/.hermes/auth/google_oauth.json,
~/.claude/.credentials.json,
~/.claude.json, and
~/.claude/stats-cache.json.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Codex CLI app-server/login
and Claude Code CLI refresh
paths used for subscription
quota and OAuth refresh
behavior.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
External APIs for DeepSeek,
xAI, OpenRouter, Vast.ai,
Exa, X Console, Anthropic
OAuth usage, Nous Portal,
Google OAuth, and Google
Cloud Code quota data.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Receives stdout table or JSON
output from ai-usage.
